description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and a global before_script which writes Debian Jessie sources to /etc/apt/sources.list.d/jessie.list, writes Jessie backports to jessie-backports.list, removes existing Jessie entries from /etc/apt/sources.list, disables apt's Check-Valid-Until, runs apt-get update, installs apt-transport-https, adds the sbt repository to /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sbt.list, imports the sbt GPG key via apt-key, updates apt again, installs sbt=0.13.8, and runs sbt sbt-version. Add a single job named test in the default test stage that executes the shell commands: sbt clean coverage verification-test:test scalastyle coverageReport. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules and runs on every commit.
